name: org-roam-toolkit
description: End-to-end org-roam workflows for Codex: skills, commands, and the org-roam MCP server. Requires the Homebrew-installed bins (ortk-mcp, ortk-emacs-eval, ortk-fetch, ortk-ocr).

interface.shortDescription: Org-roam skills and MCP tools for Codex.
interface.longDescription: Use org-roam-toolkit from Codex with skills for org-mode, org-roam note management, web fetching, OCR, and local dashboard diagnostics. The plugin registers the org-roam MCP server backed by the Homebrew-installed ortk-mcp binary.
defaultPrompt: Search my org-roam notes for this topic.
Create an atomic org-roam note from this.
